source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An 8-bit ADC converts analog voltage in the range of 0 to +5 V to the corresponding digital code as per the conversion characteristics shown in the <image>. For \( V_{\text{in}} = 1.9922 \, \text{V} \), which of the following digital outputs, given in hex, is true?
